india_trends.title: Sebi allows pledging of securities under non-discretionary PMS framework with safeguards
india_trends.summary: Sebi clarified that clients under the non-discretionary portfolio management services (ND-PMS) framework can pledge securities for their own benefit. This is permissible as clients retain beneficial ownership and full control, ensuring it is not construed as borrowing by the portfolio manager.

india_trends.title: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: US stocks future fall on extended chip losses, inflation worries
US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slide up to 0.7% as tech rally loses momentum
india_trends.summary: US stock futures showed mild losses on May 19 amid Middle East tensions. Nasdaq 100 futures fell 0.7% and S&amp;P 500 futures dropped 0.4%, marking a potential longest losing streak since March. Rising bond yields and oil prices contributed to cooling momentum in tech stocks.

india_trends.title: Turnaround Story: 10 stocks shift from loss to profit in March '26 quarter
india_trends.summary: Ten Nifty500 companies successfully moved from net losses in the March '25 quarter to significant net profits in March '26. Noteworthy turnaround stocks include Vodafone Idea (Rs 51,970 crore profit), Jindal Steel, and One97 Communications.​

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Vodafone and Coforge among 6 big movers on Tuesday
india_trends.summary: ​Vodafone, Coforge and other stocks led market action on Tuesday as IT stocks rallied while HPCL gained on fuel price hikes and select midcaps saw sharp gains and losses post earnings.​

india_trends.title: Paul John presents Kaarigari, a soulful journey into Indian craft
india_trends.summary: Paul John celebrates true Indian craft, from music and poetry to wood carving and refined single malts. Kaarigari is a tribute to the artisans that bring Indian culture to the forefront by preserving tradition while maintaining a fine balance with relevant modern sensibilities.

india_trends.summary: The project, comprising of housing plots and villas, has an estimated saleable area of 13 lakh sq ft with a revenue potential of around Rs 800 crore.
